List the top 5 most common party types a.question: List the top 5 most common party types and their human-readable descriptions.
List the top 5 most common party types a.expected_sql:
SELECT p.party_type, COUNT(*) AS party_count
FROM normalized.party p
WHERE p.is_deleted = false
GROUP BY p.party_type
ORDER BY party_count DESC
LIMIT 5

Show me policies where the insured party.question: Show me policies where the insured party is also the policyholder.
Show me policies where the insured party.expected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT h.holding_id, h.policy_id, lp.party_id AS insured_party_id
FROM normalized.holding h
JOIN normalized.life_participant lp 
  ON lp.holding_id = h.holding_id
JOIN (
  SELECT holding_id, party_id
  FROM normalized.life_participant
  WHERE is_deleted = false
  GROUP BY holding_id, party_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT participant_sk) > 1
) dup 
  ON dup.holding_id = h.holding_id 
  AND dup.party_id = lp.party_id
WHERE lp.is_deleted = false 
  AND h.is_deleted = false

For each rider, who are the insured part.question: For each rider, who are the insured participants and what are their roles?
For each rider, who are the insured part.expected_sql:
SELECT
    r.rider_id,
    r.rider_name,
    r.rider_code,
    r.rider_type,
    r.rider_status,
    r.holding_id,
    c.coverage_id,
    c.coverage_type   AS participant_role,
    c.party_id,
    COALESCE(NULLIF(p.full_name, ''), CONCAT(p.first_name, ' ', p.last_name)) AS participant_name,
    p.party_type,
    c.issue_age,
    c.issue_gender,
    c.underwriting_class
FROM normalized.rider r
JOIN normalized.coverage c
    ON r.holding_id = c.holding_id
LEFT JOIN normalized.party p
    ON c.party_id = p.party_id
WHERE r.is_deleted = false
  AND c.is_deleted = false
ORDER BY r.rider_id, c.coverage_id
LIMIT 10

How many parties are there?.question: How many parties are there?
How many parties are there?.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS party_count FROM normalized.party WHERE sk = 'METADATA' AND is_deleted = false

For policies that have a payout schedule.question: For policies that have a payout schedule, show the policyholder's name, the payout frequency, and the projected next-payout amount.
For policies that have a payout schedule.expected_sql:
SELECT
    p.full_name                                         AS policyholder_name,
    COALESCE(pp.premium_mode, c.product_code)           AS payout_frequency,
    fa.transaction_amount                               AS projected_next_payout_amount,
    fa.effective_date                                   AS payout_effective_date,
    fa.activity_type                                    AS payout_type,
    ad.holding_id                                       AS policy_id
FROM normalized.annuity_detail ad
JOIN normalized.coverage c
    ON c.holding_id = ad.holding_id
   AND c.is_deleted = false
JOIN normalized.party p
    ON p.party_id = CONCAT('PARTY#', c.party_id)
   AND p.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN normalized.policy_product pp
    ON pp.product_code = c.product_code
   AND pp.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN normalized.financial_activity fa
    ON fa.holding_id = ad.holding_id
   AND fa.activity_type IN ('Withdrawal', 'Dividend', 'Claim')
   AND fa.is_deleted = false
WHERE ad.deleted = false
ORDER BY ad.holding_id, fa.effective_date DESC
LIMIT 10

What is the total market value of all ac.question: What is the total market value of all active holdings, grouped by party?
What is the total market value of all ac.generated_sql:
SELECT
  h.PolicyID,
  SUM(h.MarketValue) AS TotalActiveMarketValue
FROM "default"."semantic-layer-dev-holdings" h
WHERE h.sk LIKE 'HOLDING#%'
  AND h.HoldingStatus = 'Active'
GROUP BY h.PolicyID
What is the total market value of all ac.executed_sql:
SELECT
  h.PolicyID,
  SUM(h.MarketValue) AS TotalActiveMarketValue
FROM "default"."semantic-layer-dev-holdings" h
WHERE h.sk LIKE 'HOLDING#%'
  AND h.HoldingStatus = 'Active'
GROUP BY h.PolicyID
LIMIT 101
What is the total market value of all ac.expected_sql:
SELECT
    p.party_id,
    p.full_name AS party_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT h.holding_id) AS holding_count,
    SUM(h.market_value) AS total_market_value
FROM normalized.holding h
JOIN normalized.coverage c
    ON h.holding_id = c.holding_id
JOIN normalized.party p
    ON CONCAT('PARTY#', c.party_id) = p.party_id
WHERE h.holding_status = 'Active'
  AND h.is_deleted = false
  AND c.is_deleted = false
  AND p.is_deleted = false
GROUP BY p.party_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY total_market_value DESC
LIMIT 10

ORDER BY CoverageProductName
LIMIT 10

What was the total financial-activity am.question: What was the total financial-activity amount per month in 2024?
What was the total financial-activity am.generated_sql:
SELECT
  SUBSTR(StatementDate, 1, 7) AS activity_month,
  SUM(
    CAST(TotalPremiums AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalWithdrawals AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalFees AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalInterest AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalDividends AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalLoans AS DOUBLE)
  ) AS total_activity_amount
FROM "default"."semantic-layer-dev-financial-statements"
WHERE Deleted = 'False'
  AND StatementDate LIKE '2024%'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(StatementDate, 1, 7)
ORDER BY activity_month
What was the total financial-activity am.executed_sql:
SELECT
  SUBSTR(StatementDate, 1, 7) AS activity_month,
  SUM(
    CAST(TotalPremiums AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalWithdrawals AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalFees AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalInterest AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalDividends AS DOUBLE) +
    CAST(TotalLoans AS DOUBLE)
  ) AS total_activity_amount
FROM "default"."semantic-layer-dev-financial-statements"
WHERE Deleted = false
  AND StatementDate LIKE '2024%'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(StatementDate, 1, 7)
ORDER BY activity_month
LIMIT 101
What was the total financial-activity am.expected_sql:
SELECT
    SUBSTR(transaction_date, 1, 7) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS transaction_count,
    SUM(CAST(transaction_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS total_transaction_amount
FROM normalized.financial_activity
WHERE SUBSTR(transaction_date, 1, 4) = '2024'
  AND is_deleted = false
GROUP BY SUBSTR(transaction_date, 1, 7)
ORDER BY month
LIMIT 12

Show the top 10 parties by total holding.question: Show the top 10 parties by total holding market value, including the investment product names they hold.
Show the top 10 parties by total holding.generated_sql:
SELECT
  p.PartyID,
  p.FullName,
  SUM(h.MarketValue) AS TotalMarketValue,
  ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT h.FundName), ', ') AS InvestmentProducts
FROM "default"."semantic-layer-dev-parties" p
JOIN "default"."semantic-layer-dev-coverages" c
  ON CONCAT('PARTY#', c.PartyID) = p.pk
 AND c.sk LIKE 'COVERAGE#%'
JOIN "default"."semantic-layer-dev-holdings" h
  ON c.pk = h.pk
 AND h.sk LIKE 'HOLDING#%'
GROUP BY p.PartyID, p.FullName
ORDER BY TotalMarketValue DESC
LIMIT 10
Show the top 10 parties by total holding.executed_sql:
SELECT
  p.PartyID,
  p.FullName,
  SUM(h.MarketValue) AS TotalMarketValue,
  ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT h.FundName), ', ') AS InvestmentProducts
FROM "default"."semantic-layer-dev-parties" p
JOIN "default"."semantic-layer-dev-coverages" c
  ON CONCAT('PARTY#', c.PartyID) = p.pk
 AND c.sk LIKE 'COVERAGE#%'
JOIN "default"."semantic-layer-dev-holdings" h
  ON c.pk = h.pk
 AND h.sk LIKE 'HOLDING#%'
GROUP BY p.PartyID, p.FullName
ORDER BY TotalMarketValue DESC
LIMIT 10
Show the top 10 parties by total holding.expected_sql:
SELECT
    p.party_id,
    p.full_name                                                        AS party_name,
    SUM(h.market_value)                                                AS total_market_value,
    ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT
        CASE
            WHEN hs.fundname IS NOT NULL THEN hs.fundname
            WHEN pp.product_name IS NOT NULL THEN pp.product_name
            ELSE 'N/A'
        END
    ), ', ')                                                           AS investment_products
FROM normalized.party p
JOIN normalized.coverage c
    ON c.party_id = REPLACE(p.party_id, 'PARTY#', '')
    AND c.is_deleted = false
JOIN normalized.holding h
    ON h.holding_id = c.holding_id
    AND h.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN normalized.holding_subaccount hs
    ON hs.holding_id = h.holding_id
    AND hs.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN normalized.policy_product pp
    ON pp.product_code = c.product_code
    AND pp.is_deleted = false
WHERE p.is_deleted = false
GROUP BY p.party_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY total_market_value DESC
LIMIT 10

JOIN normalized.coverage c ON c.holding_id = h.holding_id

FROM normalized.holding h

    p.party_id,
    p.full_name AS party_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT h.holding_id) AS holding_count,

ORDER BY total_market_value DESC

What was the total financial-activity am.question: What was the total financial-activity amount per month in 2024?
What was the total financial-activity am.generated_sql:
SELECT
    SUBSTR(transaction_date, 1, 7) AS activity_month,
    SUM(CAST(transaction_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS total_amount
FROM normalized.financial_activity
WHERE is_deleted = false
    AND transaction_date >= '2024-01-01'
    AND transaction_date < '2025-01-01'
GROUP BY SUBSTR(transaction_date, 1, 7)
ORDER BY activity_month
What was the total financial-activity am.executed_sql:

    SUBSTR(transaction_date, 1, 7) AS activity_month,
    SUM(CAST(transaction_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS total_amount

    AND transaction_date < '2025-01-01'

LIMIT 101

Show the top 10 parties by total holding.question: Show the top 10 parties by total holding market value, including the investment product names they hold.
Show the top 10 parties by total holding.generated_sql:
SELECT p.party_id, p.full_name,
       SUM(h.market_value) AS total_market_value,
       ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT hs.fundname), ', ') AS investment_products
FROM normalized.holding h
JOIN normalized.coverage c ON c.holding_id = h.holding_id
JOIN normalized.party p ON CONCAT('PARTY#', c.party_id) = p.party_id
LEFT JOIN normalized.holding_subaccount hs ON hs.holding_id = h.holding_id AND hs.deleted = false
WHERE h.is_deleted = false
GROUP BY p.party_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY total_market_value DESC
LIMIT 10
Show the top 10 parties by total holding.executed_sql:
SELECT p.party_id, p.full_name,
       SUM(h.market_value) AS total_market_value,
       ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT hs.fundname), ', ') AS investment_products
FROM normalized.holding h
JOIN normalized.coverage c ON c.holding_id = h.holding_id
JOIN normalized.party p ON CONCAT('PARTY#', c.party_id) = p.party_id
LEFT JOIN normalized.holding_subaccount hs ON hs.holding_id = h.holding_id AND hs.deleted = false
WHERE h.is_deleted = false
GROUP BY p.party_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY total_market_value DESC
LIMIT 10
Show the top 10 parties by total holding.expected_sql:
SELECT
    p.party_id,
    p.full_name                                                        AS party_name,
    SUM(h.market_value)                                                AS total_market_value,
    ARRAY_JOIN(ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT
        CASE
            WHEN hs.fundname IS NOT NULL THEN hs.fundname
            WHEN pp.product_name IS NOT NULL THEN pp.product_name
            ELSE 'N/A'
        END
    ), ', ')                                                           AS investment_products
FROM normalized.party p
JOIN normalized.coverage c
    ON c.party_id = REPLACE(p.party_id, 'PARTY#', '')
    AND c.is_deleted = false
JOIN normalized.holding h
    ON h.holding_id = c.holding_id
    AND h.is_deleted = false
LEFT JOIN normalized.holding_subaccount hs
    ON hs.holding_id = h.holding_id
    AND hs.deleted = false
LEFT JOIN normalized.policy_product pp
    ON pp.product_code = c.product_code
    AND pp.is_deleted = false
WHERE p.is_deleted = false
GROUP BY p.party_id, p.full_name
ORDER BY total_market_value DESC
LIMIT 10
